sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28885" key="dusekmo/xleutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεκ-μόχλευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28885.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to dislodge</tr_>, of disease, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:29:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.29.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
